Name: Pattern Recognition - PE

Text: The description in prompt states that its Based on the complex supply chain process described above and we must produce open ended questions

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So Ill produce exactly 20 bullet list items or numbered items

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
